install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
python -c "import torchvision; torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar10', train=True, download=True); torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar10', train=False, download=True)"

python -c "import torchvision; torchvision.datasets.EMNIST('/data/emnist', split='byclass', train=True, download=True); torchvision.datasets.EMNIST('/data/emnist', split='byclass', train=False, download=True)"
python -c "import torchtext; print('Shakespeare will be downloaded via custom loader')" || true
pip install flwr[simulation]==1.12.0 || pip install flwr==1.12.0 || true
